Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hair accessories [300225910], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: pins (fasteners) [300036423], fasteners [300036363], components by general context [300241581], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Single- or multi-pronged pins used to hold hair or headgear in place or for decorative effect.
Alfiler de una única o múltiples púas utilizado para sostener el cabello, mantener los accesorios que se utilicen en su sitio o para efectos decorativos.
Accessoires met meerdere tanden om haar of hoofddeksels op hun plaats te houden. Wordt ook voor decoratieve doeleinden gebruikt. Gebruik "haarnaalden" voor accessoires met één tand.
單叉或多叉的飾針，用以固定頭髮或頭飾，或作為裝飾之用。
Ein- oder mehrzinkige Nadel, die genutzt wird, um Haar oder eine Kopfbedeckung am Platz zu halten oder als Schmuck.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
